'''yafala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mcallisterite|mcallisterite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-f-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mcallisterite|mcallisterite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yafala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæfælæth|yæfælæth]] || [[word:yæfælæj|yæfælæj]] || [[word:yæfælæsh|yæfælæsh]] || [[word:yæfælæ|yæfælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yafafalath|yafafalath]] || [[word:yafafalaj|yafafalaj]] || [[word:yafafalash|yafafalash]] || [[word:yafafala|yafafala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yafalath|yafalath]] || [[word:yafalaj|yafalaj]] || [[word:yafalash|yafalash]] || [[word:yafala|yafala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yafaflath|yafaflath]] || [[word:yafaflaj|yafaflaj]] || [[word:yafaflash|yafaflash]] || [[word:yafaflaf|yafaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yafalatha|yafalatha]] || [[word:yafalaja|yafalaja]] || [[word:yafalasha|yafalasha]] || [[word:yafalaka|yafalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yafalath|yafalath]] || [[word:yafalaj|yafalaj]] || [[word:yafalash|yafalash]] || [[word:yafala|yafala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yafalathal|yafalathal]] || [[word:yafalajal|yafalajal]] || [[word:yafalashal|yafalashal]] || [[word:yafalakal|yafalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yafalathatha|yafalathatha]] || [[word:yafalajaja|yafalajaja]] || [[word:yafalashasha|yafalashasha]] || [[word:yafalaka|yafalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yafalathan|yafalathan]] || [[word:yafalajan|yafalajan]] || [[word:yafalashan|yafalashan]] || [[word:yafalakan|yafalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yafalathaoro|yafalathaoro]] || [[word:yafalajaoro|yafalajaoro]] || [[word:yafalashaoro|yafalashaoro]] || [[word:yafalakaoro|yafalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
